title: nf-core/methylarray pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample_id.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

idat_red.errorMessage: IDAT file for red channel must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.idat.gz'

idat_green.errorMessage: IDAT file for green channel must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.idat.gz'
